LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BURGER BAR SAN FRANCISCO LLC.'S, A LIMITED LIABILITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ARE DENIED IN THEIR ENTIRETY. EVEN ASSUMING PLAINTIFF BONIN HAD ONLY 365 CALENDAR DAYS TO FILE HIS DFEH COMPLAINT, THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE REGARDING THE DATE OF PLAINTIFF'S TERMINATION AND WHETHER HIS DFEH COMPLAINT WAS TIMELY FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Jul-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRYAN VERESCHAGIN, TEL. NO. 834-5434 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. NIMA NAMI OF THE NAMI LAW FIRM, TEL. (949)610-8535 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. BETHANY CARACUZZO OF THE MINAMI TAMAKI LLP, TEL. NO. 788-9000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BURGER BAR SAN FRANCISCO LLC.'S, A LIMITED LIABILITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - The motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication are denied in their entirety. Even assuming Plaintiff Bonin had only 365 calendar days to file his DFEH complaint, there is a triable issue regarding the date of Plaintiff's termination and whether his DFEH complaint was timely filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Aug-03-2012 Text Ruling

Bethany Caracuzzo, Esq. of Minami Tamaki LLP, Tel. 415.788.9000, appearing for defendant and moving party;
Bryan Vereschagin, Esq. of The Vereschagin Law Firm, Tel. 415.834.5434, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT BURGER BAR SAN FRANCISCO LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Compliance With And Further Responses To Request For Production Of Document, Set One, And Request For Sanctions was taken under submission. Each party to submit a proposed order. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
